research.aesthetic: Corporate wear photographed as restrained Scandinavian lifestyle fashion: clean white or pale grey studio backgrounds for product-only ecommerce shots; soft stone, concrete, quiet Copenhagen streets, waterfronts, offices and modern architectural exteriors for campaign imagery. Colour grade is cool-neutral and slightly desaturated, with crisp whites, deep navy/blacks and soft grey shadows. Styling density is low: one hero garment or simple layered outfit, minimal accessories, no clutter; occasional work-adjacent props such as laptop, notebook or coffee. Lighting is large, soft and diffused, often daylight-like from the side or front-side, with gentle contrast and no hard flash. Crops include centered front/back product images, close fabric-detail crops of collars, zips, plackets and stitching, plus mid-distance model shots showing office-to-city wearability. Mix of product-only clarity and calm model-led lifestyle imagery; models appear composed, professional and relaxed rather than expressive or trend-driven.
